blogs.title: Millers Law
blogs.blurb: The working memory of the average person can retain approximately 7 (+- 2) items at a given time.

blogs.title: Hicks Law
blogs.blurb: The time taken to make a decision increases with the complexity and the number of options.

projects.name: PM Navigator
projects.blurb: An AI multi-agent system that reads the live PM job market, finds your skill gaps against standard competency frameworks, and generates a 30/60/90-day plan. Built locally on Ollama (qwen2.5:14b) with a ChromaDB knowledge base and reflexion-pattern critique agents.

projects.name: Food Detector App
projects.blurb: A food-image classifier for 101 items with confidence scores, built on EfficientNetV2B0 transfer learning, a custom preprocessing pipeline, and a feedback-driven dataset improvement loop.

articles.title: 🚀 Building an AI-powered Food Classification System 🍔🍕🥗
articles.blurb: Created a fully functioning food recognition app that can classify 101 different food items with the basic capability to upload & predict, and generate proper responses with confidence scores for further analysis.

projects.name: HARDCOPY
projects.blurb: Founded a peer-to-peer book lending/borrowing platform. Ran user research (55+ survey responses), led a 5-person cross-functional team, scoped ~100 low-fi wireframes, and built the MVP roadmap.
